dict.string: KKTerm needs local network access to connect to SSH, SFTP, and other hosts on your network.
KKTerm needs access to your Desktop folder to upload and download files over SFTP.
KKTerm needs access to your Documents folder to upload and download files over SFTP.
KKTerm needs access to your Downloads folder to upload and download files over SFTP.
KKTerm needs access to removable volumes to upload and download files over SFTP.
KKTerm needs access to network volumes to upload and download files over SFTP.
